testcase.name: test_signup_with_investor_role
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration3_features.py:65: in test_signup_with_investor_role assert response.status_code == 200, f"Signup failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Signup failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","full_name"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"email":"test_investor_6d35d695@test.com","password":"testpass123","name":"Test Investor","role":"investor"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","country"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"email":"test_investor_6d35d695@test.com","password":"testpass123","name":"Test Investor","role":"investor"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_signup_with_business_role
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration3_features.py:79: in test_signup_with_business_role assert response.status_code == 200, f"Signup failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Signup failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","full_name"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"email":"test_founder_f43953ca@test.com","password":"testpass123","name":"Test Founder","role":"business"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","country"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"email":"test_founder_f43953ca@test.com","password":"testpass123","name":"Test Founder","role":"business"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
